metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  if p == "bird":
              return f"The {obj.lower()} is a bird found in {subj}"
          # generic fallback
          return f"is {obj}"
with:
  if p == "bird":
              return f"The {obj.lower()} is a bird found in {subj}"
          if p == "partstype":
              # e.g., Dallas | partsType | List of counties in Texas
              return f"is a type of {obj}"
          if p == "part":
              # e.g., Dallas | part | Collin County, Texas
              return f"is part of {obj}"
          # generic fallback
          return f"is {obj}"
